noProblemsFound: no problems, signs or symptoms found
lowPriorityReasonHint: Why does the problem currently have a low priority and which changes would give it a high priority?

highPriority.title: High Priority
highPriority.description: Practitioner’s judgment that a problem should be addressed promptly, based on recommendations from clients, referral sources, and others. When a problem is considered high priority, the practitioner documents the problem, provides interventions, and completes ratings.

lowPriority.title: Low Priority
lowPriority.description: Practitioner’s judgment that a problem is of secondary concern as compared to other problems, based on recommendations from clients, referral sources, and others. When a problem is considered low priority, the practitioner documents the problem, but does not provide interventions or complete ratings until the client’s needs change or increase.

demoOnboardingTitle: Great that you try our demo version 🤩
demoOnboardingDifferencesIntro: This version is different from the full app:
demoOnboardingDifferencesList:
the demo does not save or send any data 
 your changes remain locally in your browser and are gone when reloading or closing 
 there is no login, no team functions and no synchronization 
 no offline usage

noProblemWarning: No problem is selected. There is no point in documenting a problem without naming it.
duplicateProblemWarning: This problem has already been documented. It makes more sense to add to the documented problem than to create a duplicate.
noLowPriorityDetailsWarning: A brief description of why the problem is given low priority is missing.
noSymptomsWarning: No symptoms are documented even though “Actual Signs and Symptoms” is selected.
noPotentialRiskFactorsWarning: The description of the potential risk factors is missing.
noClientWishForHealthPromotionWarning: The description of the customer's wishes for health promotion is missing.
noStatusRatingWarning: The health status rating is missing.
exceedingKnowledgeRatingWarning: The knowledge goal should not be lower than the current observation.
exceedingBehaviourRatingWarning: The behavioral goal should not be lower than the current observation.
exceedingStatusRatingWarning: The health status goal should not be lower than the current observation.
unimprovableRatingsWarning: If everything is rated as best as possible, it is usually unnecessary to document a problem.
noInterventionTargetSpecificWarning: The intervention has no intervention target selected.
noInterventionDetailsSpecificWarning: The intervention has no client-specific description.
existingSignsAndSymptomsWarning: The already selected signs and symptoms are removed.
existingProblemDetailsWarning: The already specified risk factors or health promotion wishes will be removed.
existingOutcomesOrInterventionsWarning: Evaluations already made or planned interventions will be retained, but their meaning may no longer be coherently related to the problem.
reducingPriorityWarningMessage:
Setting the priority to low means that at least one active intervention for this problem will be stopped.

Are you sure you want to change the priority anyway?
changingSeverityWarningMessage:
Changing the problem severity also means removing the documented signs and symptoms, risk factors or health promotion wishes.

Are you sure you want to change the severity anyway?
changingInterventionCategoryWarningMessa:
Changing the category afterwards will also change the meaning of the intervention target and description, even for the tasks already performed. It might be more sensible to create a completely new intervention.

Are you sure you want to change the category anyway?
problemDismissalOutcomeWarningMessage:
The last rating for this problem was either a while ago or remained below the expected goals.

Would you like to do a final rating before you close the problem?
noExistingTeams: You are not yet a member of a team.
teamRolesDescription:
**Every member** can add, edit and archive clients, create a new team and leave teams.

**A Team admin** can add or remove members from the team, assign admin rights, remove clients, delete the team and change team settings.
oneAdminRequiredErrorMessage: In order to be able to abandon your admin role or to leave the team, you must first grant another member admin rights.
oneAdminRequiredErrorTitle: You are the only team admin
didConfirmEmailAddress: Your email address is now confirmed.
passwordResetSuccessfulMessage: The new password has been saved successfully.
requestPasswordResetHint: We will send you an email with a link with which you can set a new password.
requestPasswordResetSuccessfulMessage: The email has been sent. Please click on the link in the email to set a new password.
inviteTeamMemberMessage:
The invited person will be notified by email. 
Once he or she accepts the invitation, he or she will be added to the team as a member.
teamMemberInvitationFailed: The invitation could not be sent.
teamHasClientsErrorTitle: The team cannot be deleted yet
teamHasClientsMessage:
There are still clients assigned to this team. 
The team cannot be deleted until all clients have been assigned to other teams or have been deleted.

appDescription: With our app we relieve nurses in documentation, planning and evaluation and support care teams in cooperation and in strengthening their clients by using the Omaha System.

behaviourExpectationHint: What behavior to improve his or her problem can the client realistically achieve with your help?
statusExpectationHint: What health status regarding his or her problem can the client realistically achieve with your help?

ossComponents: Open Source Software Components and Fonts
externalRepositoryHint: Open external project repository with source code {url}
acknowledgementsIntro: Many people have contributed to the creation of CoopCare in a variety of ways, whether by programming, translating, supporting, encouraging, inspiring, providing feedback, or offering advice. In addition, this project is built upon a multitude of works from the Omaha System and open source communities that made it possible in the first place. We thankfully celebrate all of them for their contributions; we feel like standing on the shoulders of giants!
acknowledgementsOmahaSystemIntro: The Omaha System is a standardized taxonomy for the entire nursing process and it is the scientific foundation for the care documentation, care planning, and care evaluation in this app. We gratefully acknowledge everyone's contributions to the Omaha System, be it taxonomy, translations, guidelines, educational materials, or research.
acknowledgementsOmahaSystemPublicDomain: The Omaha System terms, definitions, and codes exist in the public domain, meaning they are not copyrighted, and may be used without permission or license fee.
acknowledgementsOmahaSystemReference: For reliable and comparable results, it is important to use the terms and structure of the Omaha System as published on the website [omahasystem.org](https://www.omahasystem.org) and in the book:
acknowledgementsOmahaSystemCopyrights: In addition, this app uses the following works protected by copyright under the subsequent copyright notice:
acknowledgementsOmahaSystemUsersGuide: User's Guide to the Omaha System (Section II)
acknowledgementsOmahaSystemDiagnoses: Client Problems Frequently Associated with Selected Conditions, Medical Diagnoses, and Treatments (Appendix C)
acknowledgementsOpenSourceIntro: This app is built on top of software components and uses fonts that are developed by many people and that are freely published under open source licenses. Without these external components, the development of CoopCare would not be possible with reasonable effort. We are deeply grateful to all contributors to these {count} open source projects for their time, experience and passion they invest in developing and improving the projects:
appCopyrightNotice: Copyright © Michael Kamphausen - All Rights Reserved
unsavedChangesMessage: You have made changes that will be lost upon canceling. Do you really want to discard your edits?
openExternalLinkDialogMessage: Do you want to open this external link:
UsernameInvalid: The username may only contain the characters A-Z, a-z, 0-9, ".", "-" and "_" and must be at least two characters long. Please check and correct the username.
UsernameExists: This username is already taken. Please choose another one or try to log in if you created this user account yourself.
UsernameDoesNotExist: This username does not exist on this device. Please add this user first on this device and then try again.
WrongPassword: The password is incorrect. Please check and correct it.
EncryptionCorrupted: The data of this user can no longer be decrypted. You can only delete this user on this device and re-register this device with this user account again.
FatalAppError: The app contains a serious error. Please check if an update is available or contact support.
UsernameUnregistered: This username is not registered or the code is invalid or expired. Please check both details and try again or receive a new invitation.
ConnectionError: No internet connection to the server. Please make sure your device is online or try again later.
NotLoggedIn: You are not logged in (anymore). Please log in first.
passwordChangeSuccessMessage: You have successfully changed your password.
ChangeHistoryTooltip:
The change history shows all changes that have ever been made to this record. This way, everyone can track who changed what and when. In addition, any change can be undone or any previous state restored - you can track down and correct errors like a time traveler! 
The history itself remains unchanged: every correction is always appended to the end of the change history, just like every change. This way no information is lost.
databaseIsNotPersisted: Your data may be deleted by the operating system when storage space is needed or when you haven't used the app for a while.
CheckForUpdatesError: An error occurred while checking for updates.
DownloadUpdateError: An error occurred while downloading the update.

Would you like to download and install the {downloadSize} update now?
updateDownloaded: A new version has been downloaded. Restart CoopCare to apply the update.
